'''Wilkadon''' was a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] who governed [[Askaji/Legends|Askaj]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Wraith Squadron]] was dispatched to capture Wilkadon, but the theft of the ''[[Killik Twilight]]'', which held the [[Shadowcast]] transmission codes, nearly scuppered the mission.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{1stm}}
